cardTitle: Soft Touch Waterproof Neoprene Makeup Bag

title: Custom Printed Embossed Logo Neoprene Toiletry Bag Soft Neoprene Makeup Pouch For Travel
seoTitle: Custom Embossed Logo Soft Waterproof Neoprene Makeup Bag Wholesale Manufacturer
description:
Premium Waterproof Neoprene Material
Made of high-density soft neoprene, our cosmetic pouch delivers silky soft touch, full water resistance, dustproof and anti-stain performance. Spills of liquid foundation, toner or lotion can be simply wiped off without leaving marks, ideal for travel and daily bathroom storage.
Quilted Padded Shockproof Structure
Three-section stitched padded design adds extra buffer protection for fragile makeup items like lip gloss, liquid lipstick and beauty blenders. The thick neoprene layer prevents your cosmetics from squeezing or breaking inside the bag.
Custom Embossed Logo Service
We offer custom deboss/embossed logo on the front surface, no extra film cost for simple brand logos. Private label, custom printing, custom color and custom dimension are all supported to match your brand positioning.
Smooth Durable Zipper Closure
Equipped with sturdy metal zipper, smooth to open and close, tightly lock all beauty supplies inside to avoid dropping out during trips. Compact lightweight size, easy to slip into handbags, backpacks and luggage.
seoDescription: Factory custom embossed logo neoprene makeup bag, soft waterproof quilted cosmetic pouch. Support OEM private label, multi colors, low MOQ wholesale for beauty brands & retailers.
